headline: History Factory Launches Chroniqle™: A Secure, Private AI Intelligence Engine for Enterprise
summary: History Factory, the global leader in corporate heritage management with clients including The Boston Beer Company, Caterpillar, Southwest Airlines and Verizon, today announced the launch of Chroniqle™, a bespoke, closed-loop AI platform for enterprise. Chroniqle transforms decades of corporate history by extracting data from analog and born-digital archives and using it to fuel a secure, conversational intelligence engine. headline: KeyBanc Flags Verizon’s (VZ) New Reporting Structure as Investor-Unfriendly
summary: Verizon Communications Inc. (NYSE:VZ) is included among the 14 Quality Stocks with Highest Dividends. On March 16, KeyBanc commented on Verizon Communications Inc. (NYSE:VZ)’s planned changes to its reporting structure, which will begin in Q1. The firm said the updated disclosures are practically useless for modeling purposes.
